title: Xtra Crispy Canadian Oats Pancakes
description: A pungent and crispy Canadian dish featuring oats, these pancakes are a delicious and gluten-free-friendly breakfast option, made with blanched oats for a lighter texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the blanched oats, gluten-free flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings, such as maple syrup or fresh fruit.
